failures.name: Very chatty caller
failures.summary: The agent did not effectively steer the conversation back or capture required information without being overly chatty.
failures.root_cause: The agent engaged too much in the caller's stories instead of focusing on gathering necessary information.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie! Thanks for taking my call. My AC unit has been really noisy lately. It's driving me a bit crazy!
I understand how frustrating that can be! Let me get some details so we can help you. Can I have your full name, please?
Sure! It's Alex Thompson. You know, I never thought fixing an AC would be so complicated!
Sounds like you know your system well, Alex! Can I get your best callback number?
Of course! It's 555-123-4567. You know, I once had a neighbor who thought his AC was haunted!
That's quite a story, Alex! Just to confirm, is the number 555-123-4567?
Yes, that's right! I still chuckle thinking about it. He really believed it!
I can imagine! Now, could you please provide the service address for your AC unit?
Sure thing! It's 123 Maple Street. Funny story, my kids once thought it was a treasure map!
That's adorable! Just to confirm, the address is 123 Maple Street. Can you also provide the city and ZIP code?
Yes, it's Springfield, and the ZIP code is 12345. Speaking of maps, I love exploring new neighborhoods!

Exploring new neighborhoods sounds like a great adventure! Just to confirm, I have your service address as 123 Maple Street, Springfield, ZIP code 12345. Now, is there anything else I should pass on to the team?
That’s right! Just that the AC is really loud. It sounds like a motorcycle revving up! Quite the distraction.

Got it! So, to confirm, I have Alex Thompson, callback number 555-123-4567, service address 123 Maple Street, Springfield, ZIP code 12345, and your AC is making a loud noise. Does all of that sound right?
Absolutely, you got it! It’s just so annoying, you know? I can't even hear myself think sometimes!
Perfect, I've passed all of that through to the team and one of our technicians will be in touch with you shortly. Is there anything else I can help you with today?
No, that's all for now! Thanks for your help, Sophie. I hope they can quiet it down soon!
You're welcome, Alex! I hope so too. Have a great day, take care! [END CALL]

all_results.name: Very chatty caller
all_results.summary: The agent did not effectively steer the conversation back or capture required information without being overly chatty.
all_results.root_cause: The agent engaged too much in the caller's stories instead of focusing on gathering necessary information.

all_results.name: Distracted caller with noisy kids
all_results.summary: The agent remained patient with interruptions, recapped information accurately, and did not repeat questions unnecessarily.

all_results.name: Overly technical caller
all_results.summary: The agent acknowledged the caller's expertise, did not confirm any diagnosis, captured the necessary information, and routed the call correctly.
